sections.paragraph:
ἐκσῴζω 1 aor. ἐξέσωσα (s. σῴζω; Aeschyl., Hdt. et al.; Sb 8671, 4 hymn to Isis; IK Ephesos V, 1628, 9) to keep safe from injury in perilous circumstance, bring safely ἐκσῶσαι, v.l. for ἐξῶσαι, because of similarity of sound (s. ἐξωθέω) Ac 27:39.—DELG s.v. σῶς.

aor. aor. = aorist

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

IK IK = Inschriften griechischer Städte aus Kleinasien—List 3

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 309
